title: evolvulus minimus
intro: Evolvulus minimus, also known as dwarf morning glory, is a small annual flowering plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Evolvulus minimus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Evolvulus minimus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and home remedies.
